abilities.name: Resonance Zone
abilities.description: Cadenza plays a dissonant chord, projecting a zone around her that scrambles the killer's audio cues — suppressing heartbeat indicators and masking nearby survivor sounds within range.

abilities.name: Harmonic Pulse
abilities.description: Cadenza strikes a violent bow strum, releasing a shockwave from her position. Killers caught in the burst are knocked back and briefly staggered.

abilities.name: Lullaby Trace
abilities.description: Cadenza hums a soft melody to a chosen ally at range, temporarily boosting their stamina regeneration and muffling the sounds they produce while active.

abilities.name: Final Movement
abilities.description: Cadenza performs her unfinished concerto in full, releasing a massive resonance burst that staggers nearby killers and fills the air with an empowering aura — briefly buffing ally speed and penalizing killer movement within range.
